God will oppose help sought from those who work with evil. Sinners can be convinced of foolishness by clear and obvious truths that they cannot deny, but they will not believe. There is no escaping the judgments of God; and evil pursues sinners. The Lord of hosts will come down to fight for Mount Zion. The Lion of the tribe of Judah will appear to defend his church. And just as birds hover over their young ones to protect them, with such compassion and affection will the Lord of hosts defend Jerusalem. He will defend it so that its safety is secured.

They have been backsliding children, yet they are children; let them return, and their backslidings will be healed, even though they have sunk deep into misery, and cannot easily recover. Many make an idol of their silver and gold, and by loving those things, they are drawn away from God; but those who turn to God will be ready to give it up. Then, when they have cast away their idols, Assyria will fall by the sword of an angel, who strikes more strongly than a mighty man, yet more secretly than a common person. God can make even the strongest heart tremble. But if we keep the fire of holy love and devotion in our hearts and homes, we may depend upon God to protect us and them.
